features.description: Fix ProfilePage component to check isEditing state and render ProfileForm when true. The startEditing() action sets isEditing=true but the component never checks this state to show the edit form.
preconditions: ProfileForm component exists at src/components/ProfileForm.tsx with isEditMode support
useProfileStore has startEditing, cancelEditing, isEditing state
expectedBehavior: When isEditing=false: show static profile display with Edit Profile and Reset Profile buttons
When isEditing=true: show ProfileForm with isEditMode=true, pre-filled with existing name/bio
ProfileForm in edit mode shows 'Save Changes' and 'Cancel' buttons
Cancel calls cancelEditing() and returns to display mode
Save calls saveProfile() and returns to display mode on success
verificationSteps: agent-browser: Click Edit Profile, verify form appears with pre-filled data
agent-browser: Click Cancel, verify returns to display mode
agent-browser: Edit name, click Save, verify updated name displayed

features.description: Add Playwright smoke tests for Profile page: edit button, cancel, save, reset profile flow.
expectedBehavior: Test: edit button shows form with pre-filled values
Test: cancel returns to display mode without changes
Test: save persists changes and shows updated profile
Test: reset clears profile and shows onboarding

features.description: Add Playwright smoke tests for all sidebar navigation links.
preconditions: App has sidebar navigation with links to Home, Meditation, History, Profile, Settings
expectedBehavior: Each sidebar link navigates to correct page
All pages load without console errors
Active page is highlighted in sidebar

features.description: Add Playwright smoke tests for Home page buttons and content.
preconditions: Home page component exists at src/pages/HomePage.tsx
expectedBehavior: Welcome message with user name is displayed
Begin meditation session button is visible and navigates to /session

features.description: Add Playwright smoke tests for Session page: begin, send message, end session.
expectedBehavior: Begin Meditation button starts session with Marcus greeting
Send message displays user message in chat
End session button ends session and shows summary

features.description: Add Playwright smoke tests for History page: session list and detail navigation.
expectedBehavior: History page shows list of past sessions
Clicking a session navigates to session detail

features.description: Add Playwright smoke tests for Settings page: export, import, clear data.
expectedBehavior: Settings page loads without errors
Export button downloads data as JSON
Clear data (with confirmation) clears all data and redirects to onboarding

features.description: Add Playwright tests for cross-area flows: onboarding→home→profile, navigation sequence, edit persistence.
preconditions: All page smoke tests are implemented
expectedBehavior: Complete onboarding flow creates profile and shows home
Full navigation sequence through all pages works
Edit profile data persists after navigation away and back
